challenges.title: Basic Image Sprite
challenges.description: Write CSS that targets an element with class 'icon' and uses a background image called 'sprites.png'. Set the width to 32px, height to 32px, and use background-position to show only the portion at 0px -64px. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.icon' in css.lower(), 'Should target the .icon class'
assert 'background' in css.lower(), 'Should use a background property'
assert 'sprites.png' in css.lower(), 'Should reference sprites.png'
assert 'background-position' in css.lower(), 'Should use background-position'
assert '-64px' in css.replace(' ', ''), 'Should offset to -64px'
assert 'width' in css.lower(), 'Should set width'
assert 'height' in css.lower(), 'Should set height'
assert '32px' in css, 'Should use 32px for dimensions'
hints: An image sprite is a single image containing multiple icons; you show one at a time using background-position.
Use negative values in background-position to shift the sprite image up or left within the element.

challenges.title: Sprite-Based Icon Set
challenges.description: Write CSS that defines a base '.sprite' class with background-image set to url('icons.png') and display set to inline-block. Then create three icon classes: '.sprite-home' with background-position 0 0 and size 24px by 24px, '.sprite-search' with background-position -24px 0 and same size, and '.sprite-settings' with background-position -48px 0 and same size. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '.sprite' in css.lower(), 'Should define a .sprite base class'
assert 'icons.png' in css.lower(), 'Should reference icons.png'
assert 'inline-block' in css.lower(), 'Should use display: inline-block'
assert '.sprite-home' in css.lower(), 'Should define .sprite-home'
assert '.sprite-search' in css.lower(), 'Should define .sprite-search'
assert '.sprite-settings' in css.lower(), 'Should define .sprite-settings'
assert '-24px' in css.replace(' ', ''), 'Should use -24px offset for search icon'
assert '-48px' in css.replace(' ', ''), 'Should use -48px offset for settings icon'
assert 'background-position' in css.lower(), 'Should use background-position'
assert '24px' in css, 'Should use 24px for icon dimensions'
hints: Define shared properties (background-image, display) on the base .sprite class.
Each icon class only needs to set its unique background-position and dimensions.
Icons are laid out horizontally in the sprite, so offset the x value by -24px increments.
